name: Student Profiling Skill
description: Extracts structured student profiles from raw narrative data using taxonomy mapping and NLP-based information extraction. Converts unstructured student records (major, hobbies, narrative story) into standardized JSON profiles with skills, interests, experience summary, and availability — ready for downstream mentor matching, graph construction, and ranking.
author: StuRec Team - Skill 1
input_format: dict matching RawStudentRecord schema (Name, Age, Sex, Major, Year, GPA, Hobbies, Country, State/Province, Unique Quality, Story)
output_format: dict matching StudentProfile schema (student_id, grade, major, skills[], interests[], experience_summary, availability)
